Skinning Knife  
 

Quest Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 25
DMG: 2 Dmg Bonus: 35
Backstab DMG: 2
This item can be used in tradeskills.
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 2.0 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL except CLR PAL DRU MNK SHM BER
Race: ALL
Skinning Knife
Quest Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 25
DMG: 2 Dmg Bonus: 35
Backstab DMG: 2
This item can be used in tradeskills.
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 2.0 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL except CLR PAL DRU MNK SHM BER
Race: ALL

Item Type:1H Piercing
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:0 pp 3 gp 9 sp 0 cp
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-11-27 19:16:57
Page Updated:Sun Jun 4th, 2017

Expansion: Original
Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 1
[Quests | Recipes | Comments ]

Crafted: This item is crafted by players.
  • Skinning Knife (Smithing, 41 trivial)
    • Class: ALL
    Expansion: Original
    Yield: 1 x Skinning Knife

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Innothule Swamp
Quest Name
Guktan Shield No. 1

West Freeport
Quest Name
Beginner Smith Test
Used in 60 recipes.
Recipe list - Premium only.
Made using the blacksmithing skill. Used with the tailoring skill in a sewing kit, this will lower the quality of a skin or pelt by one notch.


Uploaded December 13th, 2025 by Drewinette
Send a correction

Is it not possible to be crafted exclusively in Halas by a newb SHM? The component is in the lowest trivial tailoring recipes. I may find out the hard way. Ha! Just don't laugh, ok?

Dagger Blade Mold & Hilt Mold are in POK:
QuoteReply
# Nov 25 2016 at 1:06 PM Rating: Decent
-REDACTED-
Scholar
64 posts
Check out ((Ctrl-F)) Smithing Vendor "Boiron Ston"...he's got these items for sale. He's located down the hill from the Spirit Shrouds npc.


---Vionetta Of (the oh, so quiet) Trakanon
Archon of the 66th Season
▲ Page top
Skinning Knife
QuoteReply
# Mar 27 2011 at 6:19 PM Rating: Good
snailish
4,580 posts
The dagger blade mold and hilt mold appear to be on a variety of vendors (not necessarily listed).

Playing on Time-locked progression, I can confirm that Jenna Smith (weapons), In West Freeport, loc= -55.55, -1428.04, -136.57 sells both items pre-Kunark.

She is at a tent just north of the Ashen Order building for the loc and /find impaired.

Thanks to eleventyfive's post (way down the list) from 2006 that helped me get to her to check.
▲ Page top
Component Vendor
QuoteReply
# Nov 19 2008 at 6:57 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592780835097
9 posts
All the necessary components for this are in the smithy on the 2nd floor of CR. Smithy Azibo sells the Hilt and Dagger Blade molds and the small brick of ore is available from, among others, Smithy Yahya.

__DEL__1591798295413
View User Forum
4 posts
Hmmm...I think I'm right in saying that the skinning knife can't be used by druids right? Anyone know how a druid is supposed to skin pelts down? Aside from finding someone to do it for you I mean...

thanks :)
▲ Page top
RE: Skinning for druids
QuoteReply
# Sep 20 2004 at 2:28 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
My druid uses this knife to skin down pelts. You don't have to equip it, just combine with the pelt in your tailoring kit.

17 posts

You cannot combine these items in this container type!

Am I doing something wrong?

RE: Broken?
QuoteReply
# Jun 21 2003 at 10:20 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966293226
2 posts
If it's not working then it's not the correct type of pelt. I use mine all the time with no problem.

RE: Broken?

# Jun 21 2003 at 10:19 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966293226
2 posts
You have to make sure the wolf pelt is either HQ, MQ, or low.

▲ Page top
RE: Buy it somewhere?
QuoteReply
# Mar 26 2003 at 1:34 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592245745802
View User Forum
Sage
950 posts
I put like 5 for these on my vendor in the bazaar, at 10pp each. They took FOREVER to sell, so I don't stock them anymore.

My trader slots are better used for other items that give me a bigger return. However, fillet knives DO stack, so I might just start stocking those.
▲ Page top
RE: Buy it somewhere?
QuoteReply
# Mar 22 2003 at 8:26 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
Nope, player made only, unless someone sells one to a merchant.

But, with a 41 trivial, you could probably make one yourself in 10 tries, even with zero skill.

# Jun 02 2002 at 11:36 PM Rating: Decent
Valdon
674 posts
just to let you know,my alt right now would KILL for one. and I cant get em anywhere. im desperite, I might make her start smithing JUST to make her tailoring more available. it would help a LOT to be able to lower the grade of a skin. Then again I just learned SKIN and PELT were the same, thought SKINS were used for bags and whips and stuff... i dind tknow it was a simple name change.

▲ Page top
RE: id pay at least 5pp for one.
QuoteReply
# Mar 26 2003 at 9:04 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1593361825251
Guru
4,574 posts
You have discovered one of the joys of trade skilling. *smiles* There are a lot of inconsistencies you have to learn about along the way. Another thing you’ll find is that if you plan to take any trade skill to 250, it’s very handy to work many of your other trade skills to about 100 or so. Many times your trade skill of choice will require items made by other trade skills. And being able to make them yourself is much faster and cheaper than depending on someone else to do so.

Dissappearing Knives!
QuoteReply
# Jul 05 2001 at 11:43 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593965850278
14 posts
Does anyone have any experience of these things dissappearing from your inventory like they're no rent? I have had three of these knives since I started the game, and the first two mysteriously dissappeared from my inventory. I thought I probably accidentally sold the first one, so I made a new one, but it was gone too in a just a matter of 30 minutes or so, and I know for a fact, that I did not sell it, because I hadn't visited any merchants in that time. My third one, is still around, but it has only been a day or two. I'm confused as hell!

What do I need to make A skinning knife I'm a master smith but have never made a Skinning Knife before

Amoand 18lvl warrior Barbarian
Master Smith
▲ Page top
You need no more than having cash and skill
QuoteReply
# May 25 2001 at 9:04 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591759273418
53 posts
1 small piece of ore (or brick --> I forgot), hilt mold (as in for all daggers and swords), Dagger blade mold (for making daggers... no duh!)
▲ Page top
RE: You need no more than having cash and skill
QuoteReply
# Jul 12 2001 at 12:50 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
Its a brick of ore. Also don't forget water.
▲ Page top
HILT MOLD
QuoteReply
# May 01 2001 at 2:06 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Does anybody know where I can find a Hilt mold I have looked everywhere i can currently get
I am based in FP any help would be appreciated
▲ Page top
RE: HILT MOLD
QuoteReply
# Jun 15 2001 at 12:20 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
Dagger blade mold is available across from the inn in west freeport, in an unmarked building. The hilt mold is in the building (blue) next to the tavern in east Freeport (actually back door to import shop), around the corner from the armor shop. The Ore is at Grolflah's Forge in North Freeport. The recipe is:

1 small brick of ore (which weighs 15 pounds, get this last)
1 Dagger Blade mold
1 Hilt mold
1 flask water

Combine in forge.

I have a blacksmith skill of 40, and with 102 wisdom succeed about 1/3 of the time. Have succeeded twice out of 6 tries. Could be good or bad luck, but that's my experience!

Update: with my blacksmith skill at 69, I succeed most of the time now.
▲ Page top
RE: HILT MOLD
QuoteReply
# Jul 21 2006 at 10:07 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595175758078
Scholar
17 posts
strange, won't let me edit my post... but it will let me edit Xannru's post above mine. so update, Jenna Smith under the tents next to the Freeport East sign in front of The Ashen Order (Monk Guild - /find Monk Guildmaster) sells both molds. she is not listed as selling smithing supplies in find :(
▲ Page top
RE: HILT MOLD
QuoteReply
# Jul 21 2006 at 9:44 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595175758078
Scholar
17 posts
Couldn't find the hilt mold or the dagger blade mold in freeport on the progression servers, So I went to Kaladim instead! Up the stairs of the everhot forge, Bndainy Everhot sells both items.
